heading: Omitted
label: 604 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , the Legislative Appropriation Act, 1977, which authorized the Congressional Budget Office to contract without regard to section 5 of former Title 41, Public Contracts, applied to fiscal year 1977 and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation act:Pub. L. 94–440, title V, § 50090 Stat. 1452Oct. 1, 1976, , .Pub. L. 94–157, title I89 Stat. 834Dec. 18, 1975
